positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a floating cityscape at sunset. The city is composed of geometrically stacked structures and fantastical vehicles, rendered in a vibrant palette of deep indigos, burnt oranges, electric purples, and teal. The central element is a stylized, crescent moon visible above the skyline, casting warm backlighting and sharp shadows. The style is modern graphic illustration, blending Art Deco linework with ethereal watercolor washes. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, focusing on strong silhouettes against a luminous gradient sky. Highly print-ready, clean lines, limited color palette for apparel printing.
